general.no_permission: You don't have permission to use this command.
general.error: An error occurred. Please try again later.
general.cannot_moderate_higher: You cannot moderate a user with a higher role than yours.
general.cannot_moderate_self: You cannot perform this action on yourself.
general.cannot_moderate_bot: You cannot perform this action on the bot.

tickets.panel_description:
Click the button below to open a ticket.
A staff member will assist you as soon as possible.
tickets.user_added: {user} has been added to the ticket.
tickets.user_removed: {user} has been removed from the ticket.
tickets.max_tickets: You have reached the maximum number of open tickets ({max}).
tickets.not_a_ticket: This command can only be used in a ticket channel.
tickets.auto_close_warning: ⚠️ This ticket will be automatically closed in {minutes} minutes due to inactivity.
tickets.auto_closed: Ticket automatically closed due to inactivity.

moderation.ban_dm:
You have been banned from **{server}**.
Reason: {reason}
moderation.kick_dm:
You have been kicked from **{server}**.
Reason: {reason}
moderation.timeout_success: **{user}** has been timed out for **{duration}**. Reason: {reason}
moderation.timeout_dm:
You have been timed out in **{server}** for **{duration}**.
Reason: {reason}
moderation.warn_dm:
You have been warned in **{server}**.
Reason: {reason}
moderation.mute_dm:
You have been muted in **{server}** for **{duration}**.
Reason: {reason}
moderation.lockdown_activated: 🔒 **Lockdown activated.** The server has been locked.
moderation.lockdown_deactivated: 🔓 **Lockdown deactivated.** The server has been unlocked.
moderation.auto_action_mute: Auto action: mute for {duration} min (threshold {threshold} warns reached)

anti_raid.detected: ⚠️ **Possible raid detected!** {count} users joined in {seconds} seconds.
anti_raid.new_account: Account too new (created {days} days ago). Action: {action}.
anti_raid.lockdown_auto: 🔒 Automatic lockdown activated due to raid.

toxicity.detected: Your message was removed because it was deemed inappropriate.
toxicity.reset_success: Toxicity offenses for **{user}** have been reset.
